title: lilium dauricum
intro: Lilium dauricum, also known as the Daurian lily or Tiger lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lilium dauricum include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lilium dauricum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
